title: SmsChannelConfig
description: TOML config for one wcore-channel-sms instance. Secrets are keychain-handles only.

from_number.description: Twilio-owned phone number (E.164, e.g. "+15551234567") used as the outbound From for every send.

credential_handle_account_sid.description: Key used to look up the Twilio Account SID (ACxxxxxxxx...) in the CredentialsStore.

credential_handle_auth_token.description: Key used to look up the Twilio Auth Token in the CredentialsStore.

api_base_url.description: Override for the Twilio REST API base URL. Defaults to https://api.twilio.com — tests inject a mockito URL here.

max_retry_attempts.description: Number of attempts (including the first) before giving up on transient failures.
